name: Vivian Blaine
abstract: Vivian Blaine (born Vivian Stapleton; November 21, 1921 – December 9, 1995) was an American actress and singer, best known for originating the role of Miss Adelaide in the musical theater production of Guys and Dolls, as well as appearing in the subsequent film version, in which she co-starred with Marlon Brando, Jean Simmons and Frank S…

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: The original Guys and Dolls, with Robert Alda, Vivian Blaine, Tom Petty, B. S. Pulley, Stubby Kaye.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
